sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's optimal f method: Use geometric mean of HPRs (TWR^1/N) to assess system quality and determine position sizing through profit reinvestment. Actual optimal_f value not specified by author; requires empirical calculation from trade series.

source_rule_text: Use geometric mean of holding period returns (HPR) across all trades to measure system quality and determine appropriate position sizing through reinvestment of profits.
